title: cli.rs Init command panics on non-UTF-8 path argument
description: src/cli.rs:120: path.to_str().unwrap() panics if the path contains non-UTF-8 bytes (valid on Linux). Similarly db.rs:71 does the same. Consequence: broadside init <path-with-bad-bytes> aborts with a panic instead of an error message. Fix: use .to_str().ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!("path is not valid UTF-8"))? in both locations.
close_reason: P0 fixes: AtomicU64, UTF-8 path, OsRng, 410 cleanup, constant-time key compare, checked_mul, SSRF guard, sanitized URLs, persona exists check, UTF-8 safe truncate
